topPlaces.name: Lalupur Khas
topPlaces.description: Lalupur Khas is a village in Harchandpur block of Rae Bareli district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located 6 km from Raebareli, the district headquarters.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Aastik Swami Mandir, Raebareli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Aastik Swami Mandir, Raebareli is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Aastik Swami Mandir, Raebareli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Lucknow Charbagh (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Aastik Swami Mandir, Raebareli?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Aastik Swami Mandir, Raebareli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Aastik Swami Mandir, Raebareli?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Aastik Swami Mandir, Raebareli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Aastik Swami Mandir, Raebareli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lalupur Khas, Mubarakpur, Harchandpur, Didaur, Alipur Khalsa, Salarpur, Sataon.
